_meta.description: Complete catalog of US transplant centers from SRTR PSR data
_meta.source: SRTR PSR National Center-Level Summary Data
_meta.notes: Center codes use 2-letter state prefix + 2-letter institution code. Coordinates (lat/lon) to be added in issue #116.

geocodingProvenance.automated: geopy/Nominatim — 133 centers geocoded from hospital name + state
geocodingProvenance.city_mapping: 52 centers assigned city-level coordinates from srtr-center-mapping.json (not hospital-specific)
geocodingProvenance.manual: 63 centers manually looked up from known hospital addresses
geocodingProvenance.limitation: Manual and city-mapping coordinates may be approximate (within 1-5km of actual hospital). City-mapping coordinates point to city center, not specific hospital. All coordinates should be verified and updated when a geocoding API with hospital-level accuracy becomes available (e.g., CMS Provider of Services file with lat/lon).
